TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kulukulu == sakapet a tuud:ansi,auk sakapet misanga:bakan,salusalus u culuk nu hican: ketunen ipuu' nu awuk, manu bacu' silumeniay, nikatatapal nu puu'i tiza 2. disdisen kiza puu', masatalakaway salalamenengen. masanga tu. ahicaen ku uzip: saayaway sa kuliten ku tusa a sulit ilala'. u zuma sa i teban sazikuzay pazengen ku sapikawa. siwantan tu ku batad. kau kulukulu ku sapakulu i teban nu tuud. kiya mahetik malakelaku tuud. iyadahay kuni kalakal sausin sa. katuuday nu tademaw sa makademecay. malcad u mi pawlinciway nu ayzaay.
S.PHON: == kur~…ĺukur~…ĺu == sakap…ôt a tuud:ansi,auk sakap…ôt misaŇča:bakan,sar~…ĺusar~…ĺus u ¶ur~…ĺuk nu ńßi ¶an: k…ôtun…ôn ipuu Ē~ ° nu awuk, manu ba ¶u Ē~ ° sir~…ĺum…ôniaj, nikatatapar~…ĺ nu puu Ē~ °i tiza *. disdis…ôn kiza puu Ē~ °, masatar~…ĺakawaj sar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôn…ôŇč…ôn. masaŇča tu. ańßi ¶a…ôn ku uzip: saajawaj sa kur~…ĺit…ôn ku tusa a sur~…ĺit ir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. u zuma sa i t…ôban sazikuzaj paz…ôŇč…ôn ku sapikawa. siwantan tu ku batad. kau kur~…ĺukur~…ĺu ku sapakur~…ĺu i t…ôban nu tuud. kija mańß…ôtik mar~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺaku tuud. ijadańßaj kuni kar~…ĺakar~…ĺ sausin sa. katuudaj nu tad…ômaw sa makad…ôm…ô ¶aj. mar~…ĺ ¶ad u mi pawr~…ĺin ¶iwaj nu ajzaaj.
S.FORM: == kulukulu == sakapet a tuud:ansi,auk sakapet misanga:bakan,salusalus u culuk nu hican: ketunen ipuu' nu awuk, manu bacu' silumeniay, nikatatapal nu puu'i tiza 2. disdisen kiza puu', masatalakaway salalamenengen. masanga tu. ahicaen ku uzip: saayaway sa kuliten ku tusa a sulit ilala'. u zuma sa i teban sazikuzay pazengen ku sapikawa. siwantan tu ku batad. kau kulukulu ku sapakulu i teban nu tuud. kiya mahetik malakelaku tuud. iyadahay kuni kalakal sausin sa. katuuday nu tademaw sa makademecay. malcad u mi pawlinciway nu ayzaay.
S.PHON: == kur~…ĺukur~…ĺu == sakap…ôt a tuud:ansi,auk sakap…ôt misaŇča:bakan,sar~…ĺusar~…ĺus u ¶ur~…ĺuk nu ńßi ¶an: k…ôtun…ôn ipuu Ē~ ° nu awuk, manu ba ¶u Ē~ ° sir~…ĺum…ôniaj, nikatatapar~…ĺ nu puu Ē~ °i tiza *. disdis…ôn kiza puu Ē~ °, masatar~…ĺakawaj sar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôn…ôŇč…ôn. masaŇča tu. ańßi ¶a…ôn ku uzip: saajawaj sa kur~…ĺit…ôn ku tusa a sur~…ĺit ir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. u zuma sa i t…ôban sazikuzaj paz…ôŇč…ôn ku sapikawa. siwantan tu ku batad. kau kur~…ĺukur~…ĺu ku sapakur~…ĺu i t…ôban nu tuud. kija mańß…ôtik mar~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺaku tuud. ijadańßaj kuni kar~…ĺakar~…ĺ sausin sa. katuudaj nu tad…ômaw sa makad…ôm…ô ¶aj. mar~…ĺ ¶ad u mi pawr~…ĺin ¶iwaj nu ajzaaj.
